summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, or fix artifacts are planned. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PR is kept closed; remaining open PRs stay non-mutating for maintainer review or proof follow-up.
